view.title: Validate persona scenario #3

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the expected outcome of the persona scenario.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aims to validate the outcome of running a consolidated report for multiple clients, but there is no direct evidence provided that confirms the scenario behavior or its expected results. The linked use cases and prior steps do not demonstrate any API interactions or state checks that would validate the specific outcome of the report generation. Therefore, the validation remains inconclusive due to a lack of concrete evidence supporting the expected result.
